summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bloom trans community app - second iteration with fixes applied. All major features working including Bloom branding with trans pride colors, user registration with avatar selection, services with location filter and reply button, specialists page (SelectItem fix successful), legal Q&A, news page, and admin setup endpoint.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 'Admin already exists' on subsequent runs
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - works correctly on first use

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Bloom branding and trans pride colors
User registration with avatar selection and unique username validation
Services page with location filter and reply button functionality
Specialists page loads without errors (SelectItem fix successful)
Legal page with Q&A and articles tabs
Navigation works correctly across all pages
Trans pride color scheme properly implemented
